request.summary: Public mirror smoke seed for validating seed schema and private path hygiene.

primary: Keep a deterministic public-safe seed fixture available for mirror validation.
non_goals: Do not depend on private corpus, run artifacts, or local diagnostic workspaces.

soft: Keep the fixture compact and human-reviewable.

success_criteria.text: The seed fixture validates against ops/schemas/seed.schema.json.
The seed fixture contains no path references excluded from the public mirror.

frozen: tests/fixtures is part of the public mirror surface.
This fixture is schema coverage, not release evidence.

notes: Public-safe seed fixture for aggregate public test coverage.
